name: WASM Plugin Pack
description: 将 WASM 插件注册、生命周期、沙箱 dry-run/执行、远程安装审批队列、installer continuation handoff、下载缓存写回、缓存包签名验证写回、安全包结构检查写回与 installer registration handoff 计划作为高风险可选能力包暴露。

routeSpecs.description: Read WASM plugin pack shell status and sandbox readiness.
Register or dry-run validate a WASM plugin manifest.
Read one WASM plugin manifest by slug.
Mark a registered WASM plugin as loaded and ready to execute.
Unload a WASM plugin without removing its metadata.
Execute or dry-run plan a loaded WASM plugin in the sandbox.
Preview a non-destructive remote signed WASM package install plan.
Preview a non-destructive approval gate plan required before remote signed WASM package install.
Preview a non-destructive approval decision application plan without mutating the approval queue or installer state.
Preview a non-destructive approval queue write-back bridge plan without persisting decisions or allowing installer continuation.
Persist only a pack-local approval queue store record for a remote install decision; no package download, signature verification, plugin file write, or installer continuation is performed.

Plan-only installer continuation handoff that consumes the pack-local approval queue store and emits installer handoff artifacts without download, network access, signature verification, plugin file writes, registration, or installer continuation.

Download an approved remote package into the pack-local installer cache after matching the approval queue record and SHA-256; no signature verification, extraction, plugin file write, registration, or remote_install_ready transition is performed.

Verify cached package bytes with Ed25519 signature material from the approved installer download record and persist only pack-local signature verification store/record artifacts; no download, extraction, plugin file write, registration, or remote_install_ready transition is performed.

Inspect a verified cached package archive for safe manifest and WASM module layout, then persist only pack-local package inspect store/record artifacts; no extraction, plugin file write, registration, load, or remote_install_ready transition is performed.

Plan a non-destructive installer registration handoff from a verified package inspect record; no extraction, plugin file write, metadata registration, WASM load, or remote_install_ready transition is performed.
Export a JSON evidence pack for one WASM plugin and its permission plan.
